opportunities.title: Cost Reduction
opportunities.rationale: AAPL can reduce costs by optimizing its operating expenses, which currently account for 35.37% of its revenue. By reducing operating expenses by 10%, the company can improve its operating margin and increase its net income by 5-8%. The current state is a high operating expense ratio, the target state is an operating expense ratio of 25%, and the impact is a 5-8% increase in net income.

action_items.action: Reduce operating expenses by 10% to improve operating margin
action_items.rationale: Reducing operating expenses will improve AAPL's operating margin and increase its net income, driven by the company's high operating expense ratio of 35.37%

peer_positioning: AAPL's profit margin of 29.28% is lower than GOOGL's 32.8%, and its revenue growth of -65.46% is significantly lower than GOOGL's 293.73% and AMZN's 297.92%. AAPL's debt-to-asset ratio of 0.7675 is also higher than GOOGL's 0.3024 and AMZN's 0.4975.
investment_verdict: REDUCE/AVOID due to deteriorating fundamentals and high debt-to-asset ratio
